ABOUT THE EVENT

JOIN THE PARTY

Join us for an electrifying Zumba® Masterclass with two of the world's most celebrated ZJ™ International Presenters — Benjamin Richard and Rodrigo Angello — as they bring the Aussie Spirit Tour to Darwin for one unforgettable afternoon.

Open to all levels. Wear comfortable activewear and bring plenty of water — it's going to get hot in here!

HOSTED BY

ZIN™ Sila Crosley

SUPPORTED BY

Top End Zumba Crew & NT ZIN™ Members

MEET YOUR INSTRUCTORS

THE ZJ™ DUO

RODRIGO ANGELLO
🇧🇷 Brazil
Zumba® International Presenter · ZJ™

Born and raised in Brazil, Rodrigo's style blends Latin fire with technical mastery. A sought-after ZJ™ presenter across multiple continents, his classes are known for leaving participants breathless, empowered, and hungry for more. Darwin, prepare to be moved.

BENJAMIN RICHARD
🇫🇷 France
Zumba® International Presenter · ZJ™

Hailing from France, Benjamin is a powerhouse on the dance floor — known for his infectious energy, precision choreography, and ability to make every person in the room feel like a star. With years of international experience, he brings artistry and expertise to every masterclass.

GOT QUESTIONS?

FREQUENTLY ASKED

Do I need to be a Zumba instructor to attend?
Not at all! This masterclass is open to everyone — whether you're a certified ZIN member, a dance enthusiast, or just love to move. All fitness levels welcome.
What's the difference between the ticket tiers?
All tickets get you the exact same full masterclass experience! The tiers are purely release-based — Early Bird ($22, 30 spots) is the best deal. Once those sell out, First Release opens at $32, then Full Price at $42. Book early and save!
How do I pay after I register?
After submitting the booking form, PayID payment details will appear on screen. Transfer your total to [email protected] via your banking app, using your name as the reference. Your spot is held for 24 hours.
What should I bring on the day?
Wear comfortable activewear and supportive sneakers. Bring a water bottle and a small towel. Everything else is on us!
Is this suitable for beginners?
Absolutely! Benjamin and Rodrigo are brilliant at making everyone feel included. If you can move, you can Zumba!
Can I transfer or get a refund on my ticket?
Tickets are non-refundable but fully transferable. If you can't make it, pass your ticket to a friend — just let us know via email before the event date.
